RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF GCFS, INC.'S Motion For Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted And For Attorney Fees. Motion to deem Requests for Admission admitted is Denied. Defendant Dvorkin has provided complete verified responses to the Requests for Admissions, Set One without objections. C.C.P. 2033.280(c).
